title: Bare Bones x The Aether
description: Makes The Aether compatible with Bare Bones
body:
**Presenting: Bare Bones x The Aether**

![Bare Bones x The Aether Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4305d1aa4d59205933f50fe6c21be706fdba5413.png)

![Bare Bones X The Aether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5f24d2d7cf2b400e9dd25c2dfee7f83d52d7eac.png)

**This pack aims to make The Aether and all of its addons compatible with Bare Bones**
   
Currently Added
--------------------------------
1. **The Aether (Main Mod)**
2. **Aether: Lost Content (Addon)**
3. **Aether: Enhanced Extinguishing (Addon)**
4. **Aether: Treasure Reforging (Addon)**
5. **Aether: Protect Your Moa (Addon)**
--------------------------------
**Currently not added (will be added in the future)**
--------------------------------
1. **The Aether: Redux (Addon)**
3. **Deep Aether (Addon)**
------------------------------
